subTopicTitle: Poems of the Decade (Anthology) — Eat Me — Patience Agbabi

items.prompt: How might the theme of power dynamics in 'Eat Me' by Patience Agbabi be relevant in a modern societal context?
keyPoints: Relevance to contemporary discussions on consent
Reflection of societal pressures on body image

markingCriteria.none: Fails to connect theme to modern context accurately
